title: lithocarpus subreticulatus
intro: Lithocarpus subreticulatus, also known as the Taiwanese copper beech, is a species of tree native to Taiwan, belonging to the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus subreticulatus include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and extracts, can be found in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential side effects.
